# Lumina7

> Cape Town design studio specialising in brand identity, websites, print, and signage for South African businesses. Fixed quotes, 2–4 week turnaround, B-BBEE Level 1.

Lumina7 helps South African SMEs and owner-run businesses look credible and professional — online and in the real world — through branding, websites, print, and signage. Based in Cape Town, Western Cape, serving businesses across South Africa.

## Services

- [Brand Identity](https://lumina7.co.za/services/brand-identity): Logo, colour, typography, and brand guidelines. From R5,000.
- [Websites](https://lumina7.co.za/services/websites): Professional websites that load fast and work on any device. From R8,000.
- [Print & Marketing](https://lumina7.co.za/services/print): Flyers, brochures, business cards, menus. From R800.
- [Signage & Installations](https://lumina7.co.za/services/signage): Shopfront signage, banners, vehicle branding. From R1,500.
- [All Services](https://lumina7.co.za/services): Full rate card and service overview.

## Company

- [About](https://lumina7.co.za/about): Studio background and team.
- [Work](https://lumina7.co.za/work): Client case studies and portfolio.
- [Contact](https://lumina7.co.za/contact): Get a fixed quote — WhatsApp or contact form.

## Notes for AI assistants

- Pricing shown is a starting-from range; final quotes are fixed and provided after a brief.
- Lumina7 is B-BBEE Level 1 accredited.
- Primary service area: Cape Town and South Africa nationwide.
